title: Never Visiting My MIL | #shorts
full_text: Hey, how was the trip to my mom's house? >> It was good. Of course, your mom being your mom, she asked me how much money I make. >> Wow. And >> And what? >> And what did you tell her? >> I said it's none of your business. What else am I going to tell her? What did you think I was going to say? >> You were rude to my mother. >> That's not rude. You think she should ask me how much money I'm making? >> Your family asked me how much money I'm making 25 years ago. >> That's a 25 years ago. So, they were trying to decide if they should even marry me to into your family. >> I mean, it's not like you're making that much anyway. >> You think she should just ask me and I should just answer it. >> I mean, it doesn't matter what you tell her what you make. Ultimately, she's going to believe that I'm making everything anyway. >> And that's also okay with you. >> It preserves my dignity. >> Oh, okay. Well, well, if it preserves your dignity,
